comment.body:
right? So first I identify the object itself, then I measure its properties. Then I do the same with the next one, and the one after that. 
Based on these measurements or observations, I'll form propositions and construct models of the entire system in which the examined objects exist.

comment.body: What does it mean mathematically to prove something?
comment.raw_body: What does it mean mathematically to prove something?

user.name: Alma
user.bio: Privat investor & speculator | Mathematics | Self-made quant | Market researcher | Options and Futures trader

comment.body: Well, it's a precisely defined concept. It exactly means that we verify whether the given statement truly follows from the assumed axiomatic system according to the rules of our logical system.
comment.raw_body: Well, it's a precisely defined concept. It exactly means that we verify whether the given statement truly follows from the assumed axiomatic system according to the rules of our logical system.

user.name: Alma
user.bio: Privat investor & speculator | Mathematics | Self-made quant | Market researcher | Options and Futures trader

comment.body: So, as in the case of the theorem regarding the interior angles of a triangle: I take out the Euclidean axioms, examine how they define the plane, and then check whether the statement indeed follows from that definition or not
comment.raw_body: So, as in the case of the theorem regarding the interior angles of a triangle: I take out the Euclidean axioms, examine how they define the plane, and then check whether the statement indeed follows from that definition or not

comment.body: But there are two problems
comment.raw_body: But there are two problems

user.name: Alma
user.bio: Privat investor & speculator | Mathematics | Self-made quant | Market researcher | Options and Futures trader

comment.body:
There were two key implicit statements in this monologue. 
The first is that I can only list a finite number of axioms, so I am only capable of defining finite systems. 
The second is that our logical system is continuously evolving, so incomplete
comment.raw_body:
